hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *) case "$CMD" in */home/coder/.local/*|*/home/coder/.cache/*|*/home/coder/.npm/*|*/home/coder/.cargo/*|*/usr/*|*/opt/*|*/nix/*|*/snap/*|*site-packages*) ;; *) [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' ;; esac ;; esac; true
